reason: EVAS-only speed experiments are candidate evidence; paper-facing speed claims require same-slice EVAS/Spectre timing.

p0_existing_baseline.reason: Timing exists, but this slice does not show an EVAS speedup over Spectre.
p0_existing_baseline.hardware_caveat: existing artifact compares local EVAS wrapper timing with remote Spectre wrapper timing

strict_current.label: Current EVAS settings from the benchmark testbench

skip_source_error_control.label: Default-off fast path: skip source nodes in dynamic voltage error-control

profile_fast_skip_source_error_control.label: Fast profile plus default-off source-error-control ablation

safety_requirements: P2/P3 candidates must keep behavior status equal to strict_current
P2/P3 candidates must pass waveform parity against strict_current before promotion
default-off fast paths require Spectre revalidation before any paper claim
